description: Style NoteAdd a pop meets punk edge to this season to your summer staples from sepia. Style this piece with non-typical wardrobe updaters like a chunky bracelet or clunky heels to add an instant spunk to your ensemble. For a girly vibe, wear this with a pastel scarf or shrug and a whimsical hair accessory - effortless spring style! Product DetailsBlue sleeveless top, has a spread collar and V-neck, lace detail above the bust at the front and back, a full buttoned placket, pintucks at the chest that flare at the midriff, flaring tucks at the back yoke and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
